name: BRANDYWINE REALTY TRUST
summary: PART I Overview We are a self-administered and self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) engaged in the acquisition, development, redevelopment, ownership, management, and operation of a portfolio of office, life science/lab, residential and mixed-use properties. During the twelve months ended December 31, 2025, we owned and managed properties within four segments:(1)Philadelphia Central Business District (Philadelphia CBD), (2)Pennsylvania Suburbs, (3)Austin, Texas, and (4) Other.
